geography: City of Columbus Division of Water service area
subsidyType: no-interest deferred repayment program for proactive replacement
publicSideCovered: not a separate public-side grant claim because LEAP is framed as a property-owner financing path
privateSideCovered: yes through a zero-interest deferred repayment structure
propertyRules: property owner may use LEAP to replace a lead or galvanized line proactively or when it is leaking
contractorRules: property owner chooses the contractor and must sign an agreement with the city and contractor
